verdict.label: Worth checking
verdict.headline: Rey Cortiço After work (16:30 start)
verdict.reason: Rey Cortiço is worth a quick check for after work (16:30 start), but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  The wind should be manageable, but not a big advantage.  The tide should let the sandbars work without overdoing it.

best.bestWind: ideal E/ENE/ESE, usable NE/SE, clean <=22 km/h

photo.alt: Photo of Rey Cortiço surf spot

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Rey Cortiço looks like a small north coast window for Rare window, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 15 kJ, 8 s period, lully 0/100, and wind is not fully clear.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small; 6-9s at low tide can still work on Belgas if the sandbars are lined up, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully.
best.shortExplanation: Rey Cortiço is worth a quick check for after work (16:30 start), but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  The wind should be manageable, but not a big advantage.  The tide should let the sandbars work without overdoing it.

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

ranked.explanation: Lagide looks like a small window for Fun progression, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 13 kJ, 8 s period, lully 0/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small; 6-9s at high tide is too flat and weak on the reef shelves.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; 6-9s at high tide is too flat and weak on the reef shelves; SwellMap rating 1/10 Poor — caution.
ranked.shortExplanation: Lagide is worth a quick check for lunch, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  The wind should be manageable, but not a big advantage.  The tide makes the reef a bit less forgiving.
warnings: 6-9s at high tide is too flat and weak on the reef shelves

ranked.explanation: Cerro looks like a clean small window for Too soft, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 16 kJ, 8 s period, lully 0/100, and good wind at 20 km/h.  A sheltered beachbreak with gentle lefts and rights, somewhat similar to Cantinho but less consistent; this is best for manageable bodyboard waves when north-northwest swell reaches the bay with clean southerly wind.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; 6-9s at high tide is usually too fat for exposed beaches like Belgas / Almagreira / Cerro / Meio da Baia; Cerro looks below your bodyboard fun size; Cerro may feel too soft without more push.
ranked.shortExplanation: Cerro is worth a quick check for lunch, but it is not a guaranteed session.  It looks too soft to make the drive worthwhile.  The wind should help keep it tidy.  The tide is part of the picture, but not the deciding factor.
warnings: 6-9s at high tide is usually too fat for exposed beaches like Belgas / Almagreira / Cerro / Meio da Baia
Cerro looks below your bodyboard fun size
Cerro may feel too soft without more push

ranked.explanation: Meio da Baia looks like a small window for Too soft, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 14 kJ, 8 s period, lully 0/100, and wind is not fully clear.  An inconsistent Baía spot that can work well when north-northwest swell reaches the bay; this is best for bodyboard sessions when the bay is clean, there is enough period and size, and the forecast shows a defined wave.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; 6-9s at high tide is usually too fat for exposed beaches like Belgas / Almagreira / Cerro / Meio da Baia; Meio da Baia looks below your bodyboard fun size; Meio da Baia may feel too soft without more push.
ranked.shortExplanation: Meio da Baia is worth a quick check for lunch, but it is not a guaranteed session.  It looks too soft to make the drive worthwhile.  The wind should be manageable, but not a big advantage.  The tide is part of the picture, but not the deciding factor.
